tables.table_title: Accuracy of the Proposed System on Different CAPTCHA Types
tables.table_note: Table presents the accuracy of the proposed system across different CAPTCHA types. The results show that the system performs well on text-based and distorted text CAPTCHAs, achieving accuracies of 95.3% and 92.7%, respectively. However, the performance drops to 88.5% on mixed CAPTCHAs, indicating areas for further improvement.
